history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing upward. The cell directly in front of me at row 06 column D is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The cell to my right at row 07 column E is free floor, and the upper area to the right also appears open. I should turn right to face the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right. The cell directly in front of me is row 07 column E, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The cell above me at row 06 column D is open floor and forms a safe vertical corridor, while the left side is blocked by lava columns. To face the safe corridor, I should turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward again at row 07 column D. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is lava, so I must not move forward. The cell to the right at row 07 column E is safe floor, giving access to an open passage. Turning right is the safest next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

TURN_LEFT
